_comment: Each reminder targets people by role and/or team, runs on a cron schedule, and sends 'message'. 'cron' uses standard 5-field syntax in the TZ from .env. target.roles / target.teams are arrays; empty or omitted means 'everyone'. Copy this to reminders.json.

reminders.message: Morning! 🌅 Drop your top 3 deals for today in the group. — Billy
Friday wrap-up: please log this week's tickets before EOD. — Billy
Reminder to take a break and drink water 💧 — Billy
